actions.description: JSON array of action filters. Similar to events but references saved actions by ID.

console_log_filters.description: JSON array of console log entry filters. Example: '[{"key":"level","type":"log_entry","value":["error"],"operator":"exact"}]'

date_from.description: Start date for the search range. Relative: '-3d', '-7d', '-24h'. Absolute: '2024-01-01'. Defaults to '-3d'.

date_to.description: End date for the search range. Null means 'now'. Absolute: '2024-01-15'.

distinct_ids.description: JSON array of distinct IDs. Example: '["user@example.com"]'

events.description: JSON array of event filters. Matches recordings containing at least one matching event. Example: '[{"id":"$pageview","type":"events","properties":[{"key":"$current_url","type":"event","value":"/pricing","operator":"icontains"}]}]'

filter_test_accounts.description: Exclude internal/test users. Defaults to false.

limit.description: Maximum number of recordings to return per page.

offset.description: Number of recordings to skip for pagination.

operand.description:
Logical operator to combine property filters. Defaults to 'AND'.

* `AND` - AND
* `OR` - OR

order.description:
Field to order recordings by. Defaults to 'start_time'.

* `start_time` - start_time
* `duration` - duration
* `recording_duration` - recording_duration
* `console_error_count` - console_error_count
* `active_seconds` - active_seconds
* `inactive_seconds` - inactive_seconds
* `click_count` - click_count
* `keypress_count` - keypress_count
* `mouse_activity_count` - mouse_activity_count
* `activity_score` - activity_score
* `recording_ttl` - recording_ttl

order_direction.description:
Sort direction. Defaults to 'DESC'.

* `ASC` - ASC
* `DESC` - DESC

person_uuid.description: Filter recordings by a specific person UUID.

properties.description: JSON array of property filters for person, session, event, recording, or cohort properties. Example: '[{"key":"$browser","type":"person","value":["Chrome"],"operator":"exact"}]'. Supported types: person, session, event, recording, cohort, group, hogql.

session_ids.description: JSON array of session IDs to filter by. Example: '["session-abc","session-def"]'
